fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code to identify the document sending method in the system.

fields.name: Printer
fields.tooltip: Specifies if and how the document is printed when you choose the Post and Send button. If you choose the Yes (Prompt for Settings) option, the document is printed according to settings that you must make on the printer setup dialog.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies if and how the document is attached as a PDF file to an email to the involved customer when you choose the Post and Send button. If you choose the Yes (Prompt for Settings) option, the document is attached to an email according to settings that you must make in the Send Email window.

fields.name: E-Mail Attachment
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of file to attach.

fields.name: E-Mail Format
fields.tooltip: Specifies how customers are set up with their preferred method of sending sales documents.

fields.name: Disk
fields.tooltip: Specify if the document is saved as a PDF file when you choose the Post and Send button.

fields.name: Disk Format
fields.tooltip: Specifies how customers are set up with their preferred method of sending sales documents.

fields.name: Electronic Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the document is sent as an electronic document that the customer can import into their system when you choose the Post and Send button. To use this option, you must also fill the Electronic Format field. Alternatively, the file can be saved to disk.

fields.name: Electronic Format
fields.tooltip: Specifies which format to use for electronic document sending. You must fill this field if you selected the Silent option in the Electronic Document field.

fields.name: Default
fields.tooltip: Specifies if this document sending method will be used as the default method for all customers.

fields.name: Combine Email Documents
fields.tooltip: Merge selected documents into a single PDF file when you send the documents by email or print them. For example, this reduces the number of documents the recipient must process.
